$schema: ownership registry for every Playwright spec under tests/*.spec.ts — see scripts/check-spec-ownership.mjs. Valid classes: blocking / nightly / quarantined (enforced by VALID_CLASSES in the script — this file does not restate that list, to avoid a second copy that could drift from what the script actually checks).

tests/no-horizontal-overflow.spec.ts.reason: Mobile/desktop viewport overflow regressions ship broken layout instantly. Merged from the standalone `overflow` job into `e2e-core` (4 consecutive --retries=0 runs of the full 7-spec blocking set, 0 failures, 2026-07-18) — one fewer job, same coverage.

tests/search.spec.ts.reason: Core search-result rendering; 3 tests, ~1.5s total, no network/mocks, verified green across 4 consecutive --retries=0 runs 2026-07-18.

tests/component-smoke.spec.ts.reason: Broad smoke sweep across listing/post/feed page types; 11 tests, ~7s, verified green across 4 consecutive --retries=0 runs 2026-07-18.

tests/header-login-footer.spec.ts.reason: Login CTA placement + mobile overflow; 4 tests, ~4s, verified green across 4 consecutive --retries=0 runs 2026-07-18.

tests/toc.spec.ts.reason: Core TOC interaction (mobile toggle + desktop scroll highlight); 7 tests, ~5s. Was failing on a stale post slug fixture (fixed same PR), verified green across 4 consecutive --retries=0 runs 2026-07-18.

tests/login-cta.spec.ts.reason: Login CTA logged-in/out states; 3 tests, ~6.5s. Was failing on the same stale slug (fixed same PR), verified green across 4 consecutive --retries=0 runs 2026-07-18.

tests/mogu-note.spec.ts.reason: MoguNote rendering (renamed from clawd-note.spec.ts by the Mogu/GP/MP rebrand); 3 tests, ~3s. Was failing on the same stale slug (fixed same PR), verified green across 4 consecutive --retries=0 runs 2026-07-18.

tests/brand-routes.spec.ts.reason: Mogu/GP/MP canonical-vs-retired route contract (rebrand): canonical listings serve 200, retired listings/slugs stay direct local 404s (local Astro never evaluates vercel.mjs). The public exact-permanent redirect contract for manifest-backed article/listing URLs is proven at the edge by the deploy smoke test and by tests/vercel-routing-config.test.ts against the config itself, not here.

tests/content-integrity.spec.ts.reason: Content-wide integrity sweep across all posts — too slow/broad for per-PR blocking; verified green in nightly batch 2026-07-18.

tests/no-tables-mobile.spec.ts.reason: Cross-post mobile table-rendering sweep; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/sd-source-citation.spec.ts.reason: Cross-post SD citation sweep; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/a11y-baseline.spec.ts.reason: axe-core accessibility sweep; verified green 2026-07-18, kept advisory pending a11y backlog triage.

tests/theme-parity.spec.ts.reason: Dark/light visual parity sweep; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/api-endpoints.spec.ts.reason: Feed/search-index endpoint contract checks; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/snapshots.spec.ts.reason: Contains an unconditional test.skip(true, ...) for the sitemap-index test (only generated by `pnpm build`, never by the dev server both blocking and nightly jobs run against) — that test can never pass or fail in CI as currently written. Also has a flaky search-index title check (ECONNRESET under dev-server load, observed 2026-07-18). Needs a build-then-serve rewrite before it can honestly be nightly again.

tests/color-contrast.spec.ts.reason: PR #592 fixed the /mogu-picks/ metadata/ticket-badge and pagination contrast regressions; both themes now pass the WCAG AA sweep, so this returns to the nightly set.

tests/mermaid-rendering.spec.ts.reason: Niche content-feature check, not a core interaction; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/post-page.spec.ts.reason: Broader post-page structural checks beyond the blocking smoke set; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/publish-bar-visibility.spec.ts.reason: Data-dependent (skips when no matching post exists in current content set); verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/toc-scroll-accuracy.spec.ts.reason: Detailed scroll-accuracy variant of TOC beyond the blocking core; verified green 2026-07-18.

tests/ai-popup.spec.ts.reason: 3 real failures in 'AI Popup - API Interactions' (Ask AI / Edit flows): #ai-popup never becomes visible after the mouse-drag text-selection helper. Likely interaction-timing flake in selectTextForCurrentProject(), not yet root-caused. Was also hitting a stale TEST_POST slug (fixed same PR) before this was found.

tests/ai-popup-chatbox.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same mouse-drag text-selection helper and #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts (quarantined for reproducible failures there); not independently re-run this PR — grouped pending the same root-cause fix.

tests/ai-popup-e2e-flow.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts; not independently re-run this PR.

tests/ai-popup-edit-v2.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts; not independently re-run this PR.

tests/ai-popup-extended.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts; also contains one named unconditional test.skip('GIVEN edit result WHEN clicking Cancel...') at line 139 needing its own follow-up.

tests/ai-popup-filepath.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts; not independently re-run this PR.

tests/ai-popup-iphone.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts (mobile variant); not independently re-run this PR.

tests/ai-popup-token-expiry.spec.ts.reason: Shares the same #ai-popup trigger path as tests/ai-popup.spec.ts; not independently re-run this PR.

tests/theme-toggle.spec.ts.reason: 2/6 tests fail: icon-visibility assertions expect moon-in-dark/sun-in-light, but ThemeToggle.astro CSS shows sun-in-dark/moon-in-light (icons act as 'switch to X' affordances, not current-state indicators). Needs a product decision on intended UX before the test or the CSS is changed — not a mechanical test-fixture fix.

tests/levelup-quiz.spec.ts.reason: Uses a deterministic Astro fixture route instead of mutating an excluded content fixture while browser projects run in parallel.

tests/header-mobile-layout.spec.ts.reason: 1 failing: 'nav icons must stay in a single row on mobile, pixel-aligned' — real layout regression found 2026-07-18, not yet fixed.

tests/reading-progress.spec.ts.reason: Bottom-scroll coverage disables smooth scrolling and polls the terminal value instead of sampling an in-progress browser animation.

tests/search-edge-cases.spec.ts.reason: Empty-query coverage uses semantic result counts; the 2026-07-18 failure mistook static HTML comments for rendered search results.

tests/series-nav.spec.ts.reason: 1 failing: related-articles ordering doesn't reflect tag overlap as expected — real bug found 2026-07-18, not yet fixed.

tests/ticket-badge-colors.spec.ts.reason: Rewritten (#597) around a fixed canonical MP post (mp-6) flanked by MP neighbors on both sides, so post-meta and PrevNextNav badges are always present — no data-dependent skip. Asserts computed color resolves to --color-badge-mp (never --color-badge-gp) across dark/light x desktop/mobile, 4 deterministic cases.

tests/toc-levelup.spec.ts.reason: Lv posts keep h3 out of the TOC while regular posts retain h2 + h3. Re-verified against production across all three browser projects on 2026-07-23: 27/27 passed, 0 skipped or flaky (#598).

tests/tribunal-score-panel.spec.ts.reason: Was quarantined pending a first run (status unknown); executed 2026-07-18 — 5/5 passed, 7.2s. Promoted to nightly.
